name: Henry Fonda
title: Henry Fonda - taken 3/29/82, died 5 months later on 8/12/82, 77
description: Henry Fonda - taken 3/29/82, died 5 months later on 8/12/82, 77
bio: Henry Fonda was an American actor whose career spanned five decades in film, television, and stage. His iconic roles in "12 Angry Men" and "The Grapes of Wrath" cemented him as one of Hollywood's greatest leading men.
